╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Help · Users List                                                                                                                                                                            │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Press Esc to close                                                                                                                                                                           │
│                                                                                                                                                                                              │
│ ── Resource ──                                 │ ── General ──                                │ ── Navigation ──                             │ ── Palette ──                                 │
│ Enter / d        open detail (all attributes)  │ :       open command palette                 │ j / k            cursor down / up            │ :users                  Users                 │
│ l                open Logs scoped to this user │ /       incremental search (lists)           │ h / l            scroll columns left / right │ :groups                 Groups                │
│ Shift+S          sort by STATUS                │ ?       this help                            │ gg / G           top / bottom                │ :group-rules            Group Rules           │
│ Shift+N          sort by NAME (login)          │ ~       Okta API call timeline overlay       │ Ctrl-d / Ctrl-u  half-page down / up         │ :policies               Policies              │
│ Shift+L          sort by LAST LOGIN            │ a       resource action menu                 │ Ctrl-f / Ctrl-b  page down / up              │ :apps                   Apps                  │
│ Shift+C          sort by CREATED / CHANGED     │ l       open Logs scoped to current resource │                                              │ :authenticators         Authenticators        │
│ :reset-password  send reset-password email     │ R       refresh active screen                │                                              │ :logs                   System Log            │
│ :unlock          clear LOCKED_OUT state        │ Esc     back · cancel mode · close overlay   │                                              │ :network-zones          Network Zones         │
│ :reset-mfa       remove enrolled MFA factors   │ q       close screen / quit (with confirm)   │                                              │ :authorization-servers  Authorization Servers │
│                                                │ Ctrl-c  soft quit (tail confirm)             │                                              │ :api-tokens             API Tokens            │
│                                                │ Ctrl-l  force redraw                         │                                              │ :administrators         Administrators        │
│                                                │                                              │                                              │ :apilog                 API timeline overlay  │
│                                                │                                              │                                              │ :unmask <fld>           reveal a masked field │
│                                                │                                              │                                              │ :mask                   re-mask PII fields    │
│                                                │                                              │                                              │ :help                   this overlay          │
│                                                │                                              │                                              │ :quit                   quit ota              │
│                                                                                                                                                                                              │
│ <Esc> close · </> filter                                                                                                                                                                     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
